author: m.kalinin
content: <@412614104222531604> sorry for tagging you while your are on vacation, one of the topics we touched on today's call is testing FCR impls in one of the glamsterdam devnets. Whenever you have time, could you please share the result of that testing

author: qu0b
content: could you elaborate a bit more please?

author: m.kalinin
content: basically, Barnabas was planning to enable Fast Confirmation for CL clients (some of them have it behind a feature flag). Fast confirmation should bring `safeBlock` passed to EL from CL to a much closer target to the head than it is today. The main goal is to basically check how clients deal with it post-Gloas, cause post-Gloas the `safeBlock` computation changes comparing to Fulu as we have a beacon block / payload separation

author: qu0b
content: okay will catch up on this

author: qu0b
content: so nimbus is already running FCR live on devnet-7

author: qu0b
content: dora is showing the FCR as a shield next to the Proposed badge

author: qu0b
content:
> 49 samples across slots 51738–51744 on nimbus-geth-1, mapping each safe hash back to the beacon slot whose signed_execution_payload_bid.block_hash it equals — slot lag was 1, 2 or
>   3, never 0. Steady state is 2; the tightest observation was head_slot=51744, safe=#46580 (slot 51743) → lag 1

author: qu0b
content: all 6 CLs get the Gloas parent_block_hash rule right

author: m.kalinin
content: This is great, thank a lot for the update!
